name: hd-manager-local-app
description: HD Manager desktop and mobile business management app
author: Codex

scripts.test:all: npm.cmd run test:ai-zalo && npm.cmd run test:ai-zalo-order && npm.cmd run test:stress
scripts.desktop:installer:one: npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\keep-one-windows-installer.ps1
scripts.desktop:portable: npm run build && npx.cmd electron-builder --win portable --config.win.artifactName="HD Manager 0.0.0.${ext}" && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\keep-one-windows-installer.ps1 -KeepPortable
scripts.android:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:apk:debug: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.android:apk:release: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
scripts.android:aab:release: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && gradlew.bat bundleRelease
scripts.store:preflight: npm run build && npm.cmd --prefix functions install && node --check functions/index.js
scripts.web:deploy:firebase: npm run build && npm.cmd --prefix functions install && npx firebase-tools deploy --only hosting,functions
scripts.ios:eas:preview: cd ios-expo && npx eas-cli build -p ios --profile preview
